MOTION TO COMPEL PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND EXPENSES
Off Calendar Aug-08-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's motion to compel responses to request for production of documents set 6, #28 is granted. Defendant is ordered to serve a verified response without objection and to produce responsive documents within 14 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond in a timely fashion was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $636.30 are to be paid within 14 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

Motion To Compel: Response To Pltf'S Special Interrogatories, Set # Two And Deft Chung Enterprises,Lp; Request For Production Of Documents, Set #5 To Future Paging & Cellular,Inc., Special Interrogatories, Set #5 To Deft Future Paging & Cellular,Inc. And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-21-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. 1) plaintiff's motion to compel responses to special interrogatories set #2 (Chung Enterprises LP)
2) plaintiff's motion to compel responses to special interrogatories set #5 (Future Paging and Cellular Inc.)
3) plaintiff's motion to compel responses to request for production set #5 (Future Paging and Cellular Inc.)

The motions are granted. The Court makes no rulings as to the sufficiency of any responses served after the filing of the instant motions. Failure to respond in a timely fashion was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $786.30 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Plaintiff and defendant appearing in pro per. revailing party to submit order for signature. Comm. Bruce E. Chan.
